title: taraxacum gallaecicum
intro: Taraxacum gallaecicum, also known as the Galician dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum gallaecicum include its potential to support liver function, reduce cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
